summary: Episode 21: When the traveler fell ill, Tariq and Salim tended him through the night using remedies from the books they had copied, and Noor brought food. As he recovered by dawn, Salim reflected that knowledge means most when it serves others, and that to heal and comfort the suffering is a mercy beloved by God. The traveler, restored, may soon continue his journey. Noor still doesn't know who leaves the gifts at her door.
open_threads: Noor still doesn't know who leaves the anonymous gifts at her door (Tariq knows it is Salim)
The recovered traveler may soon continue his journey, carrying the district's kindness onward
Tariq has grown from curious boy to one who turns knowledge into mercy
Noor's courtyard reading circle keeps growing
